GeneticBiomarker.description: A gene associated with a disease

MolecularTarget.description: A molecule involved in a disease

DiagnosticMethod.description: A method for diagnosing a disease
instances: National Eye Institute Visual Function Questionnaire
Veterans Administration Low Vision Visual Functioning Questionnaire

RiskFactor.description: A factor that increases the risk of a disease

ClinicalOutcome.description: A result of a medical intervention
instances: Hemorrhagic Detachment of Retinal Pigment Epithelium

DietarySupplement.description: A supplement used to treat a disease

inhibits.description: A molecule that inhibits another molecule

causesOrIncreases.description: A factor that causes or increases a disease

indicates.description: A diagnostic method that indicates a disease

diagnosedBy.description: A diagnostic method used to diagnose a disease
examples: National Eye Institute Visual Function Questionnaire

associatedWith.description: A gene associated with a disease

measuredBy.description: A diagnostic method used to measure a molecule

examples: Serous Detachment of Retinal Pigment Epithelium
Hemorrhagic Detachment of Retinal Pigment Epithelium

assessedBy.description: A diagnostic method used to assess a disease
